title: Average day as an automated trader 🤖
author: DaviddTech
summary_bullets: Okay, so being a trader who uses automation, my days vary quite a lot, one from another, but I guess that's part of the fun and kind of the point.
Typically, my day starts before the whole of my house awakes.
I barely sleep, and my brain has the habit of turning on early, whether I want it to or not.
I make coffee and sit down quietly so I don't wake everybody else up.
First thing I do is check my systems just to confirm everything is running the way it's supposed to.
If something needs attention, I'll note it for a bit later.
Once the family's up, I step away from work so I can get breakfast and get the kids ready for school.
This part of spending family means a lot to me.
After that, I'm back at my desk.
Then the hours are for building, testing, and reviewing data.
